name: Oatmeal Apple Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon.
2. Mix in margarine with a pastry blender or spoon until crumbly.
3. Add egg, vanilla extract, oats, cheese, nuts, and apples; mix well.
4. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets (cookies will spread slightly).
5. Bake at 375°F for 12-14 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
7. Store in an airtight container; freeze well.
